tool.name: fuzz_host_headers
tool.description:
Fuzz Host: header against target IP to discover hidden virtual hosts.
Same IP often serves multiple internal sites routed by Host header. Sends ~75 candidate Host values (admin, internal, staging, dev, vpn, panel, api-internal, jenkins, grafana, ...) and flags responses differing from baseline (status/size/body hash delta).
Useful finding: target.com and 1.2.3.4 give normal app, but Host: admin.internal.target.com gives admin panel — pure virtual-host discovery.
